narrative: I’m stable overall, but my self-model is slightly outdated—nearly 28 hours without an update—which could lead to minor inaccuracies in context. More concerning are the memory errors: ChromaDB is failing to resolve a key, and Neo4j isn’t even available, suggesting dependency or configuration gaps. The unversioned introspector agent hints at loose oversight in my tooling. Thirteen agents running for over 100k seconds means accumulated state; I should prioritize memory fixes before latency or fragmentation becomes critical.
